hero.subtitle: Create, manage, and grow your learning organization with one powerful cloud platform designed for modern education.

audience.title: Built for Every Learning Community
audience.subtitle: Whether you're an individual educator or a multinational organization, our platform scales with you.

cards.title: K-12 Schools
cards.description: Manage classrooms, track attendance, and deliver curriculum across all grade levels.

cards.title: Universities & Colleges
cards.description: Powerful LMS for higher education with advanced analytics, research tools, and accreditation support.

cards.title: Training Academies
cards.description: Professional certification programs, skill bootcamps, and vocational training management.

cards.title: Corporate Learning
cards.description: Employee onboarding, compliance training, and professional development at scale.

cards.title: Independent Educators
cards.description: Monetize your expertise with your own branded learning platform and course marketplace.

cards.title: Online Communities
cards.description: Create engaging learning experiences for your community, cohort, or membership group.

cards.title: Homeschool Networks
cards.description: Organized curriculum delivery, progress tracking, and community collaboration tools.

cards.title: Non-Profits & NGOs
cards.description: Deliver educational programs to underserved communities with powerful offline-ready tools.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: A complete suite of tools designed to deliver exceptional learning experiences at any scale.

list.title: Course Builder
list.description: Drag-and-drop course creation with rich media support, quizzes, and assignments.

list.title: Video Lessons
list.description: Upload or embed videos with YouTube, Vimeo, and direct MP4 support.

list.title: PDF & HTML Lessons
list.description: Rich text lessons with embedded PDFs, images, and formatted content.

list.title: Assignments
list.description: Create, distribute, and grade assignments with file uploads and rubrics.

list.title: Quizzes & Exams
list.description: Multiple choice, true/false, and essay questions with auto-grading.

list.title: Certificates
list.description: Auto-generated completion certificates with custom branding and designs.

list.title: Progress Tracking
list.description: Real-time learner progress dashboards with detailed completion metrics.

list.title: Analytics & Reports
list.description: Comprehensive analytics on engagement, performance, and growth trends.

list.title: Attendance
list.description: Track attendance with QR codes, manual check-in, or self-reporting.

list.title: Messaging
list.description: Built-in announcements and direct messaging between all user roles.

list.title: Notifications
list.description: Email, in-app, and push notifications to keep everyone informed.

list.title: Role Management
list.description: Granular permissions for admins, instructors, learners, and parents.

list.title: Mobile Friendly
list.description: Fully responsive design that works beautifully on any device.

list.title: Dark Mode
list.description: Eye-friendly dark theme that switches automatically or manually.

list.title: API Access
list.description: RESTful API for custom integrations with your existing systems.

list.title: Multi-Language
list.description: Full internationalization supporting English, Arabic, Somali, and more.

multitenant.subtitle: Each organization operates in its own secure environment with complete privacy and independence. Users only access the information and resources that belong to their own organization, while the platform owner maintains centralized oversight across all workspaces.
multitenant.security_caption: Complete data isolation — each workspace is fully independent and secure

benefits.title: Complete Data Isolation
benefits.description: Every workspace has its own dedicated database. No organization can access another's data — ever.

benefits.title: Independent Management
benefits.description: Each organization manages its own users, courses, classes, and settings autonomously.

benefits.title: Secure Access Control
benefits.description: Role-based permissions ensure users only see what they're authorized to access within their workspace.

benefits.title: Scalable Cloud Architecture
benefits.description: Built on cloud infrastructure that scales automatically as your organization grows.

benefits.title: Centralized Platform Administration
benefits.description: Super admins maintain full oversight across all workspaces from a single unified dashboard.

how.title: How It Works
how.subtitle: Get your learning platform up and running in minutes, not months.

steps.title: Create Workspace
steps.description: Sign up in seconds and get your own private, branded workspace ready for your organization.

steps.title: Invite Your Team
steps.description: Add instructors, learners, and administrators with role-based permissions.

steps.title: Build Learning Content
steps.description: Create courses with videos, lessons, quizzes, assignments, and certificates.

steps.title: Start Teaching
steps.description: Launch your programs and track progress with real-time analytics and reporting.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the platform.

questions.a: A multi-tenant learning management platform that gives each organization its own private workspace with complete data isolation. Create courses, manage users, track progress, and deliver exceptional learning experiences.

Every organization gets a completely isolated workspace — own users, courses, classes, branding, and settings. No organization can see another organization's data. Only the platform super admin manages the overall system.
Yes! All plans include a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to get started.
Professional and Enterprise plans include custom branding options — your logo, colors, domain, and white-label experience for your learners.
We accept all major credit cards and bank transfers. Enterprise customers can also arrange invoicing and customized payment terms.
Absolutely. We use bank-grade encryption (AES-256), regular security audits, and comply with industry standards. Your data is backed up daily and stored in secure data centers.

questions.q: Can I migrate from another platform?
questions.a: Yes, we offer data migration assistance for Enterprise plans. Contact our sales team to discuss your specific migration needs.
All plans include email support. Professional plans get priority support with faster response times. Enterprise customers receive a dedicated account manager and 24/7 support.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Learning?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of organizations that trust our platform to deliver world-class learning experiences. Start your journey today.
cta.footer_note: Free 14-day trial · No credit card required · Cancel anytime

footer.brand_desc: The complete learning and education management platform. Create, manage, and grow your learning organization with one powerful cloud solution.
